CustomField.description: Field that used for reports to show the answer for Addendum tracking question.
CustomField.formula: IF( TEXT(Is_the_proposed_event_types_PK__c) != null, TEXT(Is_the_proposed_event_types_PK__c), IF(Is_the_proposed_event_types__c = true, "Yes", IF(Is_the_proposed_event_types__c = false, "No","")))
CustomField.label: Is the proposed event types
